archived.claim: The ggpaintr working directory is a git WORKTREE of the main repo at /Users/willju/Research/ggpaintr (git-common-dir -> /Users/willju/Research/ggpaintr/.git); core.hooksPath resolves against the main repo's .git/hooks, so hook installs/checks must account for the main-repo path even when working in the worktree. (The specific worktree dir varies per campaign — currently ggpaintr-post-add-expr.)
archived.detail: Relevant to any hook/config operation and to memory feedback-serena-project-root-doesnt-follow-worktree.
archived.source: git config core.hooksPath value; git worktree layout

archived.claim: This repo's implementable enforcement hook is already installed via a chaining shim: `core.hooksPath` points at the MAIN repo's `.git/hooks`, whose `pre-commit` shim `exec`s `$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/dev/githooks/pre-commit` (the tracked enforcement hook), so it fires from the main repo AND every worktree without per-clone reinstall.
archived.detail: The hook hashes the staged plan blob via `printf '%s\n' "$(git show :f)" | grep -v 'implementable: PASS' | sha256 | cut -c1-12`; a current PASS stamp is required to commit any dev/plans/*.html|*.md or *-plan.md. For HTML the same pipeline over the unstamped worktree file reproduces the hook's hash exactly. Confirmed by committing the new plan (commit 38c48a1) cleanly.

archived.archived_reason: Restates/contradicts CLAUDE.md: describes a .git/hooks chaining shim, but CLAUDE.md lines 36-42 say those shims were removed 2026-05-30 and hooks are wired via core.hooksPath->dev/githooks. Point-in-time campaign mechanics superseded by authoritative docs; fresh session gains nothing over CLAUDE.md.

archived.claim: Tool results were sometimes delivered in delayed batches — a result for call N appeared one or more turns later, occasionally with a truncated/garbled tail — which can be mistaken for file corruption but is purely a delivery artifact; every read reconciled to clean content on the batched flush.
archived.detail: Mitigation: keep firing the needed reads and reconcile on flush; prefer serena symbolic reads (find_symbol include_body=true) which returned clean complete bodies. Recurred during this very harvest (a grep -c printed duplicated many times).
archived.verification: bar audit (kill test): Pure session/harness delivery artifact, not anchored to any code a future session opens; not HOW/WHY of the product. Transient tooling mechanics; verdict already 'unconfirmable'. Fails criteria 2,4 an
archived.archived_reason: Pure session/harness delivery artifact, not anchored to any code a future session opens; not HOW/WHY of the product. Transient tooling mechanics; verdict already 'unconfirmable'. Fails criteria 2,4 and kill test.

archived.claim: On any commit that changes R/, the pre-commit hook regenerates and auto-stages dev/agents/ggpaintr-source-expert/symbol-lines.json (it prints "[pre-commit] R/ changed — rebuilding symbol-lines.json"); use `git add -A` so the regenerated file is included.
archived.verification: bar audit (kill test): Restates CLAUDE.md line 42 (pre-commit regenerates symbol-lines.json) plus pure task mechanics ('use git add -A'); a fresh session reading CLAUDE.md learns this with no rediscovery saved.
archived.archived_reason: Restates CLAUDE.md line 42 (pre-commit regenerates symbol-lines.json) plus pure task mechanics ('use git add -A'); a fresh session reading CLAUDE.md learns this with no rediscovery saved.

archived.claim: Under TESTTHAT_PARALLEL=TRUE TESTTHAT_CPUS=4 the full suite showed FAIL 2 in test-shared-spec-seed-derived-column-browser.R with a blank `actual` value (the renderUI shared picker read before binding — a boot-tail race), but a SERIAL re-run of that file passed FAIL 0 / PASS 3, confirming it is a parallel-load flake and not a product failure.
archived.detail: Concretely validated CLAUDE.md's "residual flake under parallel load is not a product failure — re-confirm serially" rule; the file uses only string formulas (no expr()), so the normalize change cannot affect it. Full suite otherwise PASS 3463 / SKIP 0.
